watch_list.observation: subprocess.run has no explicit timeout=. Drift detector is local Python (<500ms per TDD §Performance); a wedged detector would hang the Verify phase indefinitely. Out-of-scope for WP-007 (no NFR specifies verify-time budget). Consider a defensive timeout in a future hardening pass.
